note: Real 2026 World Cup Round-of-32 draw in bracket order (the RoundN template on en.wikipedia.org/wiki/2026_FIFA_World_Cup_knockout_stage). Consecutive ties feed the next round (ties 1+2 -> first R16 tie, etc.), verified against the played R16 pairings (Paraguay v France, Canada v Morocco, Brazil v Norway, Mexico v England). Results auto-fill from the martj42 dataset, with data/knockout_overrides.json bridging upstream lag; refresh only if the draw itself is corrected.
